mapper.sql: select id, tenant_id, course_id, module_id, document_id, version_no, original_filename, file_ext, content_type, file_size, checksum_md5, bucket, object_name, status, parse_task_id, parse_error_message, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from course_document_version
mapper.select: where document_id = #{documentId} and del_flag = '0' order by version_no desc
where course_id = #{courseId} and document_id = #{documentId} and id = #{versionId} and del_flag = '0'
select coalesce(max(version_no), 0) from course_document_version where document_id = #{documentId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
update course_document_version
checksum_md5 = #{checksumMd5}, bucket = #{bucket}, object_name = #{objectName}, status = #{status}, parse_task_id = #{parseTaskId}, parse_error_message = #{parseErrorMessage}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now(), id = id
where id = #{id} and del_flag = '0'
update course_document_version set del_flag = '2' where document_id = #{documentId} and del_flag = '0'
